items.summary: Investigate and identify why the account creation button in the frontend does not respond when clicked, checking for event handler attachment, form validation errors, missing mutation calls, console errors, and any blocking conditions preventing the button's onClick handler from executing

Fix the identified issue causing the account creation button to be unresponsive, ensuring that when users click the button after entering name and email, the signup process executes and provides appropriate user feedback (loading state, success message, or error message)
